channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Telangana Board Announces 2026 Intermediate 1st and 2nd Year Results, Detailed Pass Percentage and Toppers Released
item.description: The Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education (TGBIE) has officially declared the TS Inter 2026 examination results for both first and second-year students. The announcement covers the complete ...

item.title: South African coaches and players make major impact in European rugby
item.description: South African coaches and players are having a significant influence on European rugby. Johann van Graan, former Bulls and Bath assistant coach, has transformed Bath Rugby into a top-tier club within ...

item.title: Djibouti President Secures Sixth Term Amid Weak Opposition and Constitutional Changes
item.description: For Djibouti, Ismail Omar Guelleh don secure him sixth term as president after the election wey the state control well well. Guelleh, wey don dey rule since 1999, win 97.8 percent of the vote, while h...

item.title: Toronto Cereal Selected for Canadian Participation in Artemis II Space Mission
item.description: Toronto-based breakfast company Goldys has achieved a remarkable milestone as one of its products, the strawberry lavender cereal, was chosen for the Artemis II mission. Contacted by the Canadian Spac...

item.title: Artemis II Crew Completes Record-Breaking Lunar Mission and Returns to Earth
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission has successfully concluded with the safe return of its four astronauts after a 10-day journey around the moon, covering more than 695,000 miles. The Orion spacecraft, named I...

item.title: Seven Suspects Arrested As Akwa Ibom Police Recover Weapons In Raid
item.description: The Akwa Ibom State Police Command don catch seven people wey dem suspect say get hand for criminal wahala after dem raid one hideout for Ndiya Mfia inside Ikono Local Government Area. According to th...

item.title: Brooklyn Beckham Celebrates Fourth Anniversary with Nicola Peltz Amid Family Tensions
item.description: Brooklyn Beckham and his wife Nicola Peltz recently marked their fourth wedding anniversary with a series of romantic gestures, including bouquets of white roses and heartfelt love letters. Nicola sha...

item.title: Artemis II Crew Returns Safely After Historic Lunar Flyby
item.description: The Artemis II mission successfully completed a record-breaking 10-day lunar flyby, sending astronauts farther into space than any humans before. The crew—NASA astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, ...

item.title: Rising Demand in India for Unapproved Chinese Weight-Loss Peptides
item.description: In India, a growing number of people are turning to Chinese weight-loss peptides that have not yet received official approval or completed clinical trials. The trend often starts with social media, wh...

item.title: McIlroy loses lead as Cameron Young joins him atop Masters leaderboard
item.description: Rory McIlroy's commanding lead at the Masters dissolved quickly on Saturday, creating a highly competitive race for the green jacket. After holding a six-shot advantage over the field, McIlroy saw it ...

item.title: Nigerian Comedian Sam Speedy Marries Long-Term Partner Simi Richard in Colourful Wedding
item.description: Popular Nigerian comedian Sam Speedy, who is well-known for his character Mama Ojo, has officially tied the knot with his long-term partner, Simi Richard. The wedding took place on April 10, 2026, and...

item.title: Focus ACT helps Canberrans with disabilities live independently
item.description: Focus ACT, a not-for-profit organisation, has been supporting Canberrans with disabilities for over 35 years, helping them live independently and participate actively in the community. CEO Ken Wedgwoo...

item.title: Reflecting on Divine Mercy Sunday as a Spiritual Renewal
item.description: The article reflects on the significance of Divine Mercy Sunday for Filipino Catholics, particularly as an occasion for spiritual renewal or what is sometimes called a 'great reset.' The author, Chito...

item.title: Rory McIlroy and Cameron Young Share Lead on Dramatic Third Day at Augusta
item.description: On the third day of the 2026 Masters at Augusta National, Rory McIlroy saw his commanding six-shot lead diminish as Cameron Young produced a stunning round of 65. McIlroy struggled through inconsisten...

item.title: US and Iran Hold Direct Talks Amidst Strait of Hormuz Concerns
item.description: Top-level peace talks between the United States and Iran entered a second day on Sunday (April 12, 2026), marking a significant shift in diplomatic efforts. This unprecedented development saw Iranian ...

item.title: Artemis II completes lunar orbit mission with Australian support despite technical challenges
item.description: The Artemis II mission, NASA’s first crewed voyage around the moon in over 50 years, successfully returned to Earth after a 10-day journey. The crew, including NASA astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glo...

item.title: Makau Mutua explains why Sifuna’s exit from ODM was inevitable
item.description: In this opinion piece, columnist Makau Mutua argues that Senator Edwin Sifuna’s removal as ODM Secretary-General was long decided by Raila Odinga himself. Mutua recalls private conversations where Odi...

item.title: Coalition Politics in Gauteng: Lesufi’s Risky Cabinet Reshuffle
item.description: The letter to the editor discusses the political developments in Gauteng under Premier Panyaza Lesufi’s coalition government. Gauteng, described as South Africa’s economic hub, requires strong, strate...

item.title: Three Oil Supertankers Transit the Strait of Hormuz Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: Three large oil tankers, including two Chinese vessels and one Greek vessel, recently passed through the Strait of Hormuz, signalling a modest increase in oil shipping activity following a tentative c...

item.title: Jehovah’s Witnesses Announce 2026 Convention on Achieving Lasting Happiness Through Spirituality
item.description: For people wey dey search happiness for these times, Jehovah’s Witnesses don open invitation for dem 2026 annual convention wey dem call 'Eternal Happiness.' The event go hold for three days over 17 w...
